The '''YL-2200 light freighter''' was a light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] sold around the [[3 ABY/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. It is known that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] made use of this craft.

==Description==
[[File:Out_Runner_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The cockpit of the [[Out Runner]] a YL-2200 light freighter.]]
The YL-2200 [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] was manufactured by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], measuring 28.2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length. It required a crew of only one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], as well as a single [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]], and could transport six passengers. The YL-2200 could carry 100 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, as well as two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] worth of consumables. They cost 100,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to buy new, and only 25,000 credits used.<ref name="FNM" />

The YL-2200 could reach speeds of eight hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], and had a Class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], with a Class 12 back-up. The [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] had a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] and [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] installed, along with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] mounted on turrets.<ref name="FNM" />

==History==
The ''[[Out Runner]]'' was a modified YL-2200 light freighter in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SFS">''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]''</ref>
